en.about_p1: Opera is located at the top of the Illume Hotel in the heart of Taipei. Perched on the 15th floor, it commands a one-of-a-kind panoramic view overlooking Taipei Arena and the iconic 101 tower.
en.about_p2: You will not be provided with just drinks — you will experience true craftsmanship. Every cocktail is a performance, every visit a memory.
en.bartender_bio: Previously owner-operator at R&D (Asia Top 50 Bar), Yann is a cocktail maestro, obsessed with flavors and always on the lookout for the next delightful beverage.
en.menu_intro: Every cocktail on our menu is built from the ground up. We craft all our syrups in-house and prepare each infusion ourselves — steeping spirits with fresh fruits, botanicals, flowers and spices to draw out flavors you won't find in any bottle off a shelf. From a watermelon syrup made the morning of service to an oolong-infused whiskey left to rest for days, every ingredient is intentional, every detail considered.
en.res_note: Table or entire section available for booking. Prices are minimum spend — all drinks and food included.
en.res_cta_text: Ready to book your table? Reach out to us directly — we'll confirm your reservation within 24 hours.
en.trusted_intro: Opera has been regularly hosting corporate events, transforming the space to match each client's needs and branding — from intimate gatherings of 20 to full buyouts of 300 guests.
en.trusted_s1: Panoramic view of Taipei skyline & 101 Tower
en.trusted_s3: Professional sound system & LED wall screens
en.trusted_s5: A venue with its own identity & atmosphere
en.events_intro: Let's craft your company event together. Contact us to share your needs and we'll provide a detailed quotation tailored to your vision.
en.events_note: Indicated prices are minimum spend — all food, beverages and services included.
en.pkg1_desc: Custom cocktail menu crafted by our team. Quotation required.
en.pkg2_desc: 300 NTD$ drink tickets per guest — flexible and easy to manage.
en.pkg3_desc: 400 NTD$ per guest per hour. Food budget recommended at 400 NTD$ per person.
en.contact_addr_v:
Illume Hotel, 15F
No. 100, DunHua North Road
SongShan District, Taipei
台北松山區敦化北路100號15樓

zh.hero_subtitle: 精緻調酒 · 全景天際線
zh.about_label: 全景天空酒吧 · 台北101景觀
zh.about_title: 城市上空的精釀調酒吧
zh.about_p1: Opera位於台北市中心慕軒飯店頂層。坐落於15樓，擁有無與倫比的全景視野，俯瞰台北小巨蛋與標誌性的101大樓。
zh.about_p2: 這裡提供的不只是飲品，而是真正的工藝體驗。每一杯調酒都是一場表演，每一次造訪都是一段難忘的記憶。
zh.info_view_v:
360° 全景
台北小巨蛋 & 101
城市天際線
zh.bartender_bio: Yann 曾是 R&D（亞洲前50名酒吧）的老闆兼調酒師，是一位對風味充滿熱情、不斷追尋下一杯令人驚艷飲品的調酒大師。
zh.bartender_role: 首席調酒師 · 亞洲前50名
zh.menu_label: 自製糖漿與浸漬酒 · 台北
zh.menu_intro: 我們菜單上的每一款調酒都是從零開始精心打造。所有糖漿均自製，每一種浸漬酒都親手調配——將烈酒與新鮮水果、植物、花卉和香料一同浸泡，萃取出任何瓶裝酒都無法呈現的風味。從當天早晨現做的西瓜糖漿，到靜置數日的烏龍威士忌，每一種食材都經過深思熟慮，每一個細節都不容忽視。
zh.res_label: 訂位 · 台北天空酒吧
zh.res_note: 可預訂單桌或整個區域。價格為最低消費——包含所有飲品及餐點。
zh.res_cta_text: 準備好預訂桌位了嗎？直接聯絡我們，我們將在24小時內確認您的預訂。
zh.trusted_intro: Opera 定期舉辦企業活動，依照每位客戶的需求與品牌形象靈活調整場地——從20人的小型聚會到300人的全場包場。
zh.trusted_s1: 台北天際線與101大樓全景
zh.trusted_s3: 專業音響系統 & LED大螢幕
zh.trusted_s5: 擁有獨特氛圍與個性的場地
zh.trusted_s6: 我們說法語、英語和中文
zh.events_title: 私人活動 & 企業場地租借
zh.events_intro: 讓我們一起打造您的企業活動。歡迎聯絡我們分享您的需求，我們將提供量身訂製的詳細報價。
zh.events_hr_drinks: 每小時 — 含飲品及餐點
zh.events_note: 標示價格為最低消費——包含所有餐點、飲品及服務。
zh.pkg1_desc: 由我們團隊精心設計的客製調酒菜單，需提供報價。
zh.pkg2_desc: 每位賓客300元飲品券——靈活便利，輕鬆管理。
zh.pkg3_desc: 每人每小時400元，建議每人餐點預算400元。

松山區，台北
